log_subscription_tile_title: These logs are transferred to the Logs Data Platform
log_subscription_empty_tile_description: By subscribing to this feed, you can transfer your logs directly to OVHcloud's Logs Data Platform, which allows you to perform more advanced searches, create alerts and visualisations, or simply archive them.
log_subscription_empty_tile_button_know_: Learn more about Logs Data Platform
log_subscription_terminate_modal_delete_: Please enter the word "TERMINATE" to unsubscribe from the data feed.
